component.name: AS Adventurer Creator
component.summary: VTuber creation pipeline — design, generate, prepare, export

description.p: AS Adventurer Creator is a standalone desktop tool for building animated VTuber / PNGtuber assets. It walks you through a four-step pipeline from a static sprite to a transparent looping model ready for streaming.
The app runs a local server and opens in your browser. API keys (OpenAI, Google Gemini) stay in the browser and are only sent to official provider endpoints when you use AI features.
